---
title: "quantumofgravity"
subtitle: "Physics, Computing, and the Nature of Reality"
---

Welcome to **quantumofgravity**. This site explores the interface of quantum gravity, condensed matter, and computational physics.

### Featured Content

*   [Blog](blog.qmd): Latest thoughts and research updates.
*   [Research](research.qmd): Overview of current projects.
*   [About](about.qmd): More about me and my work.
